_comment: Minimal dbt manifest (v10 schema) describing the subscriptions model. This is what a dbt user would have in target/manifest.json after `dbt compile`. DataShark reads this to build its SemanticSnapshot — see snapshot.json for the compiled form.

model.demo_project.subscriptions.name: subscriptions
model.demo_project.subscriptions.description: User subscription records. One row per subscription. Status can be 'active', 'cancelled', or NULL (unknown/onboarding).

user_id.name: user_id
user_id.description: Foreign key to the users table.

status.name: status
status.description: Subscription status. One of: 'active', 'cancelled'. NULL indicates an unknown or onboarding state — treat as DISTINCT from 'active' or 'cancelled'.

last_login.name: last_login
last_login.description: Timestamp of the user's most recent login. Note: 'cancelled' users may still have recent last_login values.
